name: How long do I have to report my warehouse injury in Saint George before I lose benefits?
description: 180 days max in Utah, but report now to protect claim.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report my warehouse injury in Saint George before I lose benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days max in Utah, but report now to protect claim.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: 180 days in Utah from injury date, but report ASAP to build case and avoid disputes.[1][5] Late reports risk disqualification.[1] Key factors: Document immediately; employer has 7 days to insurer.[1] Get doctor report (Form 123); request copies.[1] Lawyer preserves evidence timely.[5]
